extensionDescription.message: Notifications for the endless scroll. Shows a notification when you scroll past a set threshold.
extensionDescription.description: Description of the extension shown in add-ons manager.

actionTitle.description: Tooltip shown when hovering the toolbar icon.

logoTagline.description: Tagline shown below the extension name in the popup header.

unitScreensOne.description: Unit label for number of screens scrolled (singular).

unitScreensFew.description: Unit label for number of screens scrolled (few).

unitScreensMany.description: Unit label for number of screens scrolled (many).

unitScreensOther.description: Unit label for number of screens scrolled (other).

depthThreshold.description: Label for the depth threshold gauge section.

depthThresholdHint.description: Hint text below the depth threshold label.

notificationTextLabel.description: Label for the notification text input.

enabledOnSite.description: Label for the per-site toggle when no hostname is available.

enabledOnHost.description: Label for the per-site toggle showing the current hostname.

statusAutoSaved.description: Brief auto-save confirmation shown after debounced saves.

statusEnabled.description: Status message after globally enabling the extension.

statusDisabled.description: Status message after globally disabling the extension.

statusEnabledOnHost.description: Status message after enabling on a specific site.

statusDisabledOnHost.description: Status message after disabling on a specific site.

ariaThresholdValue.description: Aria label for the threshold input in the header badge.

ariaThresholdGauge.description: Aria label for the gauge threshold input.

ariaThresholdSlider.description: Aria label for the depth threshold slider.

ariaToggleGlobal.description: Aria label for the global enable toggle.

defaultNotificationText.message: You've drifted pretty far. Come up for air.
defaultNotificationText.description: Default notification text shown when the user scrolls past the threshold.

notificationSub.description: Subtitle shown below the notification title.

ariaNotificationDismiss.description: Aria label for the notification close button.

notificationMid.message: Still going? You're deep in the feed now.
notificationMid.description: Notification text for the Mid (2x threshold) depth zone.

notificationDeep.message: You've been down here a while. Time to surface.
notificationDeep.description: Notification text for the Deep (3x threshold) depth zone.

siteSettings.description: Label for the per-site configuration section.

siteOverride.description: Label for the site-specific threshold override.

siteOverrideEnabled.message: Use custom threshold for this site
siteOverrideEnabled.description: Label for the checkbox to enable site-specific override.

manageSites.description: Label for the link to manage all site overrides.

noOverrides.description: Message shown when the overrides list is empty.

statusOverrideEnabled.description: Status message when a custom threshold is enabled.

statusOverrideDisabled.description: Status message when a custom threshold is disabled.

statusOverrideRemoved.description: Status message when an override is deleted from the management list.
